string.text: The vanilla "Well Dressed" achievement (500 kills, or 250 field dressings) is meant to speed up mutant skinning/looting, but takes hours of grinding to earn. This mod applies that speed-up by default. Equipping a Hunting Kit still stacks on top for the fastest tier, same as vanilla. If FDDA Redone's mutant skinning is installed, this also skips the extra "tucking the part away" animation that plays after the knife-cut - the part is already in your inventory by then, so nothing is lost - and applies FDDA body search's auto-crouch on the knife-cut.
Treat the "Well Dressed" achievement as always earned for skinning-speed purposes, and (with FDDA Redone's mutant skinning) skip the redundant post-cut pickup animation.
Write Faster Skinning state to the game log file.

Speeds up the knife-cut animation itself when FDDA Redone's mutant skinning is installed. Above 1x we swap in our own cut sound pitched to match (since the vanilla one can't be sped up to match) and skip all camera motion tied to the cut.
